title: Unstable SMP Death Sounds - Optimized
description: An optimized enhancement of BattryLeaf's mod that plays the Wither death sound when players die, fixing non-English server bugs and removing unnecessary mixins!
body:
# Unstable SMP Death Sounds - Optimized

**An enhancement of BattryLeaf's Unstable SMP Death Sounds mod.**

This mod adds the Wither Spawn Sound Effect when a player die, like original mod, but this mod
fixes compatibility issues with non-English servers, removes unnecessary mixins for better performance, and improves reliability across different server configurations.

**Based on: [BattryLeaf's Unstable SMP Death Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/unstable-smp-death-sounds-by-bl)**
